name_cn:
Shipped 😎 Exclusive launch ZP sample
Kelly Elan Goatskin 27cm 89 Black Gold Hardware
The first true underarm bag in the Kelly family; impeccable capacity, thickness, and strap length. A high daily-use bag~
Graceful slender silhouette, kidskin with a full black-gold vintage vibe, perfect storage. The strap length and underarm carry are very nice!
